title: Rich Dutch Quick-Fix Jersey Royal Potatoes
description: A rich, crisp, quick-fix dish featuring Jersey Royal potatoes broiled to perfection, ready in minutes with a minimal carbon footprint.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C (392°F). Rinse and pat dry the Jersey Royal potatoes.
Sprinkle a pinch of salt and pepper on top of the potatoes, then evenly distribute 1 tablespoon of molten yellow cheese sauce over them. Sprinkle another layer of Panko breadcrumbs on top.
Place the prepared potato mixture in a broiler-safe dish. Broil until the sides start to turn golden brown and the center is soft and bubbly (approximately 5-7 minutes).
Carefully remove from oven, allow to cool slightly before serving. Enjoy your rich, crisp, quick-fix Jersey Royal Potatoes!
